rationale.R1.6: The output reflects a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident without flagging uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without drifting from scope.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack explicit annotation.
